selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next uncovered active parent after the live-state/index reduction completed the source-like `a2_state` sweep.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the first active A1 judgment packet into a smaller controller-usable boundary set without rereading raw sources or touching active A1 state files.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export revision archaeology next.
Strongest adjacent active sibling because it contains the pack family these judgments are judging.
Later work-surface follow-on after the first revision-ladder packet.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the A1 governance slice, family-local judgments, and cross-family synthesis needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: A1_PROPOSAL_GOVERNANCE_AND_FAIL_CLOSED_PACKAGING_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's strict proposal-governance discipline without flattening it into lower-loop proof law.

candidate_items.name: HEAD_READY_BUT_DIVERSITY_THIN_ROLE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the live executable heads explicit while preserving diversity thinness as the active closure limit.

candidate_items.name: DIVERSITY_REAL_PASSENGERS_STAY_NONHEAD
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the passenger-side half of the live head/passenger inversion without deleting those families.

candidate_items.name: SOURCE_BOUND_RUN_BACKED_JUDGMENT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the active judgments usable while blocking them from outranking the excluded evidence they rely on.

candidate_items.name: PERSISTED_STRATEGY_ASYMMETRY_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent packet's strongest packaging asymmetry across the active family set.

candidate_items.name: CROSS_FAMILY_BLOCKER_TAXONOMY_LOCK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the shared blocker frame that binds the four family-local judgments together.

quarantined_items.name: IMPROVED_ROSETTA_OR_CANONICAL_ALLOWED_HELPERS_AS_HEAD_PROMOTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly distinguishes helper/witness/candidate-admission pressure from actual executable head landing.

quarantined_items.name: A1_JUDGMENT_PACKET_AS_LOWER_LOOP_CANON_OR_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The packet is current and strict, but it remains proposal-only and source-bound rather than earned lower-loop canon.

notes: This batch preserves the first active A1 judgment packet as proposal-side role placement and blocker topology rather than lower-loop truth.
No raw source reread and no active A1 append-save were performed.
